[2506.12409] Branch, or Layer? Zeroth-Order Optimization for Continual Learning of Vision-Language Models

Branch, or Layer? Zeroth-Order Optimization for Continual Learning of Vision-Language Models
results: he application of zero-order (ZO) optimization in Vision-Language Continual Learning (VLCL) remains understudied. Therefore, we conduct an in-depth exploration of ZO in VLCL using the state-of-the-art
